title: CASSINI Challenges 2026 open for EO and GNSS startups
summary: A new round of CASSINI Challenges invites startups and SMEs to develop commercial solutions leveraging Copernicus, Galileo and EGNOS.
body: The CASSINI initiative continues to support European startups building commercial products on EU Space data. The 2026 Challenges emphasise applications in transport and mobility, climate resilience and the green transition. Winning teams receive prize funding and access to the CASSINI business-acceleration ecosystem.
